reviews.reviewComments: This new hotel is excellent for those who want to go for dolphin and snorkeling tour. Its just 2 minute away from the boat jetty. We love it here.

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya luas , bersih, bisa lihat pemandangan pantai langsung, pelayananyaa juga ramah, acnya dingin, kasurnyaa lebar
reviews.reviewComments: The room is spacious, clean, with a direct view of the beach, the service is friendly, the air conditioning is cold, and the bed is large.

reviews.reviewTitle: hotel yang sangat baru dan sangat barsih
reviews.reviewComments: tidak menyesal sama sekali menginap di sini,ada parkir motor,dan owner hotel yang sangat baik dan friendly..saya sangat senang dan tidak menyesal menginap di hotel ini..kalian juga akan merasai jika menginap di hotel ini..

The room was excellent, spacious, clean and very comfortable. The shower was particularly good, with strong water pressure. Breakfast was outstanding, very substantial. The location is superb, offering a fantastic, postcard-like view of the bay.
The staff were wonderful. Ali, Dewi and Ramlan all went the extra mile to accommodate me; they were exceptionally kind and helpful. I feel very fortunate to have stayed here and would strongly recommend it.

reviews.originalComment:
Kebersihan , pelayanan, harga , beeeeeeeehhhhhh terbaikkkkk
Ini ulasan jujur sejujur² nya 
Dengan harga segitu dapat fasilitas segitu dan kebersihan yg mantep 
Untuk saran , dibawah kasih keran , jadi untuk cuci2 kaki kalau kotor dari pantai. Soalnya hotelnya bersih kaliiiiii
reviews.reviewComments:
Cleanliness, service, price, beeeeeeeehhhhhh the best
This is an honest review as honest as possible
With that price, you get that facility and great cleanliness
As a suggestion, provide a tap below, so you can wash your feet if they're dirty from the beach. Because the hotel is really clean.
This new hotel is excellent for those who want to go for dolphin and snorkeling tour. Its just 2 minute away from the boat jetty. We love it here.
